scripts.dev: npm run copy:img && concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm run copy:img && npm run build --workspace=client && npm run build --workspace=server
scripts.build:render: npm run db:generate --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=server && npm run copy:img && npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
